label: Setup worktree
command: bun install && NX_TUI=false bun run domain:generate

label: Update NuGet Package (interactive)
command: dotnet list apps/dh/api-dh/source/DataHub.WebApi/DataHub.WebApi.csproj package --outdated --format json | jq -r '.projects[].frameworks[].topLevelPackages[] | "\(.id) \(.resolvedVersion) -> \(.latestVersion)"' | fzf --header='Select package to update' | awk '{print $1}' | xargs -I {} dotnet add apps/dh/api-dh/source/DataHub.WebApi/DataHub.WebApi.csproj package {}
